name: simdeck-vscode
description: Open the local SimDeck simulator inside VS Code.

simdeck.serverUrl.description: Preferred URL loaded inside the simulator webview. If auto-start launches a daemon on a different port, the extension uses the daemon URL returned by the CLI.

simdeck.cliPath.description: Optional path to the simdeck CLI. When empty, the extension first checks the workspace build and then falls back to PATH.

simdeck.port.description: Preferred port used when the extension auto-starts the project daemon.

simdeck.bindAddress.description: Bind address used when the extension auto-starts the project daemon.

simdeck.autoStartDaemon.description: Start or reuse the project daemon with `simdeck ui` when opening the simulator view if the preferred URL is not already reachable.
